author: openclawmara
title: Shadow Scoring Pipeline: ScoreBundle aggregates silently discarded and replaced by divergent recalculation
notes: All four claims verified. ScoreBundle computes 4 aggregate scores never read in production — _materialize_dimension_scores uses only per-dimension data, then _aggregate_scores recomputes independently. Semantic divergence in verified_strict_score confirmed: Pipeline 1 includes subjective dims, Pipeline 2 (live) excludes them. SUBJECTIVE_WEIGHT_FRACTION=0.60 confirmed. Dead computation is real but causes no production bug since discarded values are unused. Maintenance trap is the strongest argument. Related but distinct from S151 (monotonicity angle).
